---
title: Vector
description: An entity with magnitude and direction, represented as an n-tuple in
  a vector space.
categories:
- Linear Algebra
---

A **vector** is an entity involving both magnitude and direction that can be represented as an $n$-tuple

$$
\vec{x} = (x_{1}, \dots, x_{n}) \in V
$$

where $V$ is the vector space.
